programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E20 - JJ's Bedtime & Daily Routines!
programme.desc: Join JJ for bedtime stories & daily routines! Mommy sings a lullaby when JJ doesn't want to sleep, & Ms. Appleberry leads the first nap time at school. Then, walk Bingo around the neighborhood as everyone greets JJ! The routine fun continues as the family builds JJ's first big boy bed together & has a fun mother-daughter day. Plus, Mommy & Daddy sneak into the kitchen for a late-night snack!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Calming Sounds
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Join Nina on some amazing adventures with her friends! When Nina challenges her school friends to a game of soccer, she imagines herself as a true soccer star playing in a giant stadium at the World Cup! Then, she visits Grandpa's farm where she proves to be an ace tractor driver who never leaves her friends behind. From learning to share a new firetruck to going on an epic chase to get back a lost surprise egg, it's always an adventure with Nina!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: Use your imagination at JJ's big pretend play dance party! Join Cody, Nina & Bella as they pretend to explore all sorts of fun places, from outer space to the bottom of the ocean. The fun continues as everyone learns how to do the robot dance to a beep-boop beat! Then, get into your pajamas for a slumber party where you can jump, wiggle & shuffle. With fun exercise moves & graceful ballet steps, it's a dance party where you can be anything you want!

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E15 - Merry Sprouty Day Part 2
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E24 - Swophenge
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E46 - Mission Manatee, USA
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are in the Gulf of Mexico to learn about Manatees, peaceful water mammals that spend most of their time either sleeping or eating sea-grass.

programme.title: E18 - Piggyback
programme.desc: The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired, and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, mum and dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again.

programme.title: E5 - Mud
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.

programme.title: E40 - The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E17 - The Sharing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E31 - Go Jet Academy: Lightning Bolt Blackout
programme.desc: When lightning strikes Academy Island, it causes a power cut. Can the Go Jetters rescue their trapped friends without the power they need to call for Click-ons?

programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E157
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Gaze of the Double-Headed Eagle – Putin's East-West Game
programme.desc: Born into humble circumstances, he was once a secret weapon of the Soviet KGB; during his 26 years in the Kremlin, he held the fate of the double-headed eagle in his hands; he once looked to the West, only to return disappointed; between East and West, he repeatedly searched for his place. On his second visit to China, how will Putin rewrite Russia and his era?

programme.title: E3 - In The Footsteps Of The Travelling Salesmen
programme.desc: Remy Brandt has been a psychiatric nurse for forty years. Weary of this demanding work, he decides to take early retirement. To ease this transition and radical life change, he imagines a trek through the Alps in the footsteps of travelling salesmen.

programme.title: E12 - Printing Houses/Aviators/Scallops
programme.desc: In the summary: municipal elections in France - a race against the clock for printing companies; immersion in a training session with French Air Force aviators; the fragile cultivation of scallops; a hotel for cats.

programme.title: E110
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E78 - Adopting The Bra Top

programme.title: E16 - Semolina Cakes
programme.desc: This week, Leila Albert welcomes Rosine Binder from Alsace who loves her region, into her kitchen. She concocts a traditional recipe that she inherited from her mother: griesknepfle, or semolina cakes, and a savoury gratin with tomato sauce.

programme.title: E6 - Curieux Begin In Tuscany
programme.desc: Stopover in Italy! From Chianti to Subbiano, from large vineyards to small farms, Christian visits Tuscany and discovers its land, artisans, and culinary treasures.

programme.title: E28 - Transformation Of An Old Farmhouse
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Perk, Flemish Brabant, to discover the transformation of an old farmhouse into a family home. Everything has been redesigned by Aurelie, the owner and interior architect, to bring light, create new rooms, and especially modernize it through decoration.

programme.title: E16 - Louis Gabriel Nouchi
programme.desc: Viviane welcomes her first menswear designer! Louis Gabriel Nouchi presents his 2023-2024 autumn-winter collection, inspired by the novel ''American Psycho'' by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: Premier League 25/26 -Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest
Premier League 25/26 -Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest
Premier League 25/26 -Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest
She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: Swordsman
programme.desc: The Sunflower Manuscript that contains martial arts secrets is stolen from the Forbidden City. Head eunuch, Koo Kam-fook, suspects Lam Chun-nam of the theft, so he sends officer Chuen and his men to the Lam dyeing factory to investigate and kill Lam and his son, Ping-chi. Before Lam dies, he whispers to Ling Wu-chung and his schoolmate Ngok Ling-shan where he has hidden the manuscript, so that Chung can tell his son, who is not at the factory. Chung and Shan begin their trip to return to Mount Wah and meet Kwan, who is Chung's master and Shan's father. However, Chuen has already killed Chi and assumed his identity...

programme.title: Once upon a time in Triad Society
programme.desc: As the triad boss Lek-kuen is dying after being shot, he remembers how he became a triad member. Under the influence of Brethen Sheung-yee, Lek-kuen joined the triad society. Yet, Lek-kuen is so kind in nature that his superior and colleagues always betray him. He escapes to Japan but is still attacked by enemies, embroiling his wife Wooden Cart Noodle being killed. Afterwards, Lek-kuen becomes the worst guy among the triad members. At this moment, the story returns to the space-time when Lek-kuen is dying. In fact, he trumps up the mentioned story. The truth is that Lek-kuen does all kinds of evil but he survives from assassination. During the tussle between the Japanese triads and Hong Kong police, Lek-kuen is saved by a mysterious lady. Nevertheless, he is finally shot dead though nobody knows who the murderer is...

programme.title: Love is Love
programme.desc: Shek Kam Shui eloped to the city with his lover Ng Dai Tai. He becomes a diamond sales and was appraised by his senior, Nancy which finally destroys his marriage...

programme.title: Superstars Comedy: When East Goes West
programme.desc: Fei is the master cook in Hong Kong, while his son Suckling has established himself as a real estate salesman in Canada. Suckling sends for his father to join him in this new chapter of their lives. Happily, Fei hops on a plane to Canada. During the flight, he has the good fortune of meeting Yim Chau, a young woman traveling to join her aunt in Canada. Subsequently, Fei meets Yim Chau's aunt and Suckling meets Yim Chau. Suckling loves Yim Chau but is too shy to express his feelings. When Yim Chau announces she falls in love with Richard, Suckling feels heartbroken but still helps her with dating preparations. However, when he discovers Richard cheating her, Suckling fights him. At the same time, he is being chased by the bank for debts...

programme.title: Love is Love
programme.desc: Shek Kam Shui eloped to the city with his lover Ng Dai Tai. He becomes a diamond sales and was appraised by his senior, Nancy which finally destroys his marriage...

programme.desc: How do you stay fit in old age? Friedhelm Adorf has the answer. The 81-year-old exercises every morning, eats a healthy diet and trains for a world record: the 200m sprint in his age group. Unfortunately, his knee is giving him problems. Will he still succeed?

programme.title: Searching For Clues - Donations For Islamist Terrorism?
programme.desc: Islamist terrorism continues to claim numerous victims worldwide. Extremist networks are financed in part by donations from Germany. But investigations often prove to be difficult.

Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Aux avant-postes
programme.desc: Dans un monde en pleine mutation, Ali Laïdi décrypte, avec ses invités, les enjeux cachés des conflits économiques, géopolitiques et culturels, afin d'en comprendre les dynamiques profondes.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Une immersion au cœur de l'information pour analyser les faits marquants du jour et en comprendre les implications. L'émission propose également des éclairages sur les grands enjeux internationaux, afin d'offrir une lecture claire et approfondie de l'actualité mondiale.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: La Confrontation
programme.desc: In a police station, Maxime, 17, is being questioned one last time today. Anxiety rises: she will soon have to face her greatest fear. Finding herself in the same room as the man who hurt her when she was a child, her godfather.

programme.title: L'audience
programme.desc: After having fled the Congo and clandestinely crossed eleven countries, Peggy, Simon and their three children are awaiting their hearing which will decide if they are accepted as refugees in Canada. Between past ghosts, future hopes and legal mazes, the film delves into the struggle by the Nkunga Mbala family.

programme.title: E41 - Dagobert
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E8 - An Almost Complete Family
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: E35 - Amur Leopard
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: E7 - Veronique Sudry - From Reason To Passion
programme.desc: Flat tints, geometrization of lines, sharp contours... A landscape painter, with sky and water as recurring themes, Veronique Sudry shows both the omnipotence and the poetry of nature where beauty and unease coexist.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera S1
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E88 - Yojerlin Cesar
programme.desc: He's French and a very young vice world champion in boxing, light heavyweight category: Yojerlin Cesar is Mathieu Laurent's guest.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E6 - Western Australia: More Than Meets The Eye
programme.desc: Sara goes to Yawuru conservation park to try and catch some mud crabs with cultural guide Bart, who is originally from Broome.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: In the town of Stepford, Nicole Kidman and Matthew Broderick find that all the women are perfect - a little too perfect.

programme.title: E1168
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Nixon By Nixon: In His Own Words
programme.desc: This HBO Documentary shows the many sides of former president Richard Nixon, through his self-recorded private conversations in the White House from 1971 to 1973.

programme.title: Surveilled
programme.desc: Documentary centered on investigative reporter Ronan Farrow takes a deep dive into the growing spies-for-hire industry.

programme.title: The Star (Julia Roberts) and The Fighter (Wladimir Klitschko)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts relives her journey to becoming an Oscar winning actress and Wladimir Klitschko shares how he became an Olympic gold medallist and record breaking world heavyweight boxing champion.

programme.title: Politics in the World of Ants
programme.desc: The queen is head of the ant colony. Each ant has a specific role to play and their way of getting food is sometimes revolting. Honeypot ants can have nests with more than one queen. That can lead to ant wars.

programme.title: And the Winner Is
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have spent four weeks at Vet School, and it's time to go home. Now they all have a chance to do one last check-up on their grateful patients and say goodbye. But which one of the kids has impressed Paul enough to take the title of Head Vet?

programme.title: No Fear
programme.desc: Competition season is in full swing, and Josh and Kloe are preparing for the biggest competition on the British calendar. While Josh does all he can to calm his nerves, Kloe suffers an injury during practice, and things are not looking good.

programme.title: Eggcellent Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts find a mysterious egg on the beach, and try to find out who it might belong to. They discover it's a sea turtle when the whole beach hatches at once!

programme.title: Marvellous Medicine and First Aid
programme.desc: What's the best way to organise a first aid kit? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of medicine. Have hands-on fun by making a handy first aid kit, and get to know Al-Zahrawi, ‘the father of surgery' & inventor of a number of surgical instruments.

programme.title: Stinky Shoes
programme.desc: Why do Oto's lucky shoes smell exactly like stinky cheese? If they answer that question, maybe the team can deodorize Oto's smelly shoes and the clubhouse! They head to a stinky cheese festival in Limburger, Belgium, to learn what makes things smell.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Cat Toy
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat toy.

programme.title: Can Any Animal Survive in Space?
programme.desc: A Tardigrade is an aquatic micro-animal measuring around 1mm long. In 2007 some of them were sent into space on the outside of a rocket. They were exposed to the sun's radiation and the airless vacuum for 10 days. Remarkably, many of these space voyagers survived.

programme.title: The Three Little Friends
programme.desc: Two little kids ask Mai to read them the story of 'The Three Little Pigs.' Mai doesn't want to admit that she can't read and pretends that she is reading. Yoko decides to help her by putting some pictures in the book to guide her.

programme.title: Heart Attach
programme.desc: Kaylyn and Alicia struggle to find a new name for the company. Noodles' love detection device disrupts the group's harmony and must ultimately get destroyed.

programme.title: Stylosaur
programme.desc: Doodle Girl and Pencil visit the Sticky Badlands and meet Stompers, a Stylosaur with sticker shoes. He's nervous about a style-off, so they help him boost his confidence and style with fun stickers.

programme.title: The Star (Julia Roberts) and The Fighter (Wladimir Klitschko)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts relives her journey to becoming an Oscar winning actress and Wladimir Klitschko shares how he became an Olympic gold medallist and record breaking world heavyweight boxing champion.

programme.title: Can Any Animal Survive in Space?
programme.desc: A Tardigrade is an aquatic micro-animal measuring around 1mm long. In 2007 some of them were sent into space on the outside of a rocket. They were exposed to the sun's radiation and the airless vacuum for 10 days. Remarkably, many of these space voyagers survived.

programme.title: Eye Gunk
programme.desc: In this episode, the doctors put eye boogers under the microscope and show you how to make edible eye gunk!

programme.title: Making Blood and a Mind-Bending Trick
programme.desc: The doctors show where your blood comes from and Dr. Chris meets a patient going for brain surgery. They try out a mind-bending trick to test the powers of concentration. In the emergency room, someone has fallen off their horse.

programme.title: A Fright to Behold
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts celebrate Halloween by trick or treating with their forest friends.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E4 - Lakes
programme.desc: Journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives, and transforms. Witness the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle, watch a dragonfly metamorphosis, and walk tall with flamingoes as they brave burning, corrosive waters.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E6 - Life on the Wing
programme.desc: Yala National Park is an avian Eden, home to 215 species of bird. This paradise offers many possibilities for parents who can weather the ever-changing climate. Every species must either raise their offspring here or find a new home before the dry season ends and the monsoon storms begin.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E3 - Horses of the Sun
programme.desc: Grévy’s zebras population has dropped by 50% in less than 20 years. Environmentalists say that if we aren’t vigilant, they could disappear all together. Lewa Conservancy is at the heart of efforts to protect the species so that they can replenish their numbers

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E1 - Winter is Coming
programme.desc: As soon as the days get cold and dark insects begin to disappear from the meadows and fields. Their sum and hum slowly fades away and will finally be gone. All animals have their special ways to survive winter. Migrating birds like swallows and cranes fly towards south, a lot of mammals like deer get a thick winter fur or hide away and sleep where it’s warm. But what do insects do? And why are they all back in spring?

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn
programme.desc: An Australian family go on an adventure to restore an old hunting ranch in South Africa. Their goal is to rebuild the overgrown habitat, create an eco-tourism ranch, and allow the natural wildlife, including predators, to move back in.

programme.title: E1 - The Invasion Begins
programme.desc: When the all-female Hollywood pride encounters the Nomads, a new pride of rival males, they may have found the answer to their mating dry spell. But they quickly realize that it will not be a happy encounter.

programme.title: E2 - Strength in Sisterhood
programme.desc: The Hollywood pride reels after the Nomad’s brutal attack on their leader, Ava, leaves her desperately weak and unable to hunt. To add to her woes, her hungry pride start rejecting her. But without her, they struggle to bring down prey.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E4 - Lakes
programme.desc: Journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives, and transforms. Witness the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle, watch a dragonfly metamorphosis, and walk tall with flamingoes as they brave burning, corrosive waters.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E6 - Life on the Wing
programme.desc: Yala National Park is an avian Eden, home to 215 species of bird. This paradise offers many possibilities for parents who can weather the ever-changing climate. Every species must either raise their offspring here or find a new home before the dry season ends and the monsoon storms begin.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E3 - Horses of the Sun
programme.desc: Grévy’s zebras population has dropped by 50% in less than 20 years. Environmentalists say that if we aren’t vigilant, they could disappear all together. Lewa Conservancy is at the heart of efforts to protect the species so that they can replenish their numbers

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E1 - Winter is Coming
programme.desc: As soon as the days get cold and dark insects begin to disappear from the meadows and fields. Their sum and hum slowly fades away and will finally be gone. All animals have their special ways to survive winter. Migrating birds like swallows and cranes fly towards south, a lot of mammals like deer get a thick winter fur or hide away and sleep where it’s warm. But what do insects do? And why are they all back in spring?

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn
programme.desc: An Australian family go on an adventure to restore an old hunting ranch in South Africa. Their goal is to rebuild the overgrown habitat, create an eco-tourism ranch, and allow the natural wildlife, including predators, to move back in.

programme.title: E1 - The Invasion Begins
programme.desc: When the all-female Hollywood pride encounters the Nomads, a new pride of rival males, they may have found the answer to their mating dry spell. But they quickly realize that it will not be a happy encounter.

programme.title: E2 - Strength in Sisterhood
programme.desc: The Hollywood pride reels after the Nomad’s brutal attack on their leader, Ava, leaves her desperately weak and unable to hunt. To add to her woes, her hungry pride start rejecting her. But without her, they struggle to bring down prey.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Ye Hai Mohabbatein
programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.title: Savdhaan India -India Fights Back
programme.desc: See shocking crime stories based on real life events. The show focuses on stories where justice was delivered.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 8
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Bs Special 'Dull Gray Diamonds'
programme.desc: In western India lies a town known as the “Diamond City,” where rough diamonds from around the world are cut and polished by low‑paid craftsmen who have long supported the global diamond industry. Now, lab‑grown diamonds-mass‑produced through science and sold at less than one‑tenth the price of natural stones-are rapidly reshaping the market. As natural diamond prices fall by 40 percent and major companies suffer huge losses, life in the Diamond City itself is being shaken.

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Daniel Wu: The Last Supper
programme.desc: The early history of a nation unfolds through the actions of three heroes – Liu Bang, Xiang Yu and Han Xin – who chased their dreams of uniting a warring nation and fought through major milestones of the Chu-Han Contention years in the third century. From the Julu War to the Hongmen Banquet, the Gaixia War to the death of HanXin, the narration of Liu Bang – who would be the founding emperor of the new Han Dynasty – sets the stage for a tale of betrayal and brothers at war, where the last man standing inherits a nation.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

E1 - Tuscany
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci returns to Tuscany, his former home, alongside his parents Stan and Joan. Tuscany is the birthplace of the Renaissance and world-class art, architecture and culture.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: There's a waterfall of chocolate at a California candy factory; meet the saucy squad behind mountains of cannelloni; find out what it takes to make rice noodles by the truckload; and a hardworking team takes the hassle out of preparing butternut squash.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: From tree to bottle, follow the amazing story of maple syrup; there's a 'tower of power' behind a delectable Almond Roca butter toffee popcorn; a British Columbia candy company is giving Turkish Delight a thoroughly modern twist; and find out the secret behind apples that taste like grapes.

programme.title: E126 - Neighbourly Bean/Nurse!
programme.desc: As Mr Bean settles down to watch his favourite TV programme he hears loud noises from next-door. He moves from house to garden but can’t escape the relentless cacophony of trumpets, electric drills, and screaming babies.

programme.title: E140 - Basketbugs / A Skate Of Confusion!/Mt. Neverest / Telephone Pole Gag: Zip Line / Fast
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny plays some streetball.

programme.title: E403 - Well Deserved/Program On Demand/Frosty Cup/Choco Granito/Quick Meal/Digital Taming/Gl
programme.desc: The Lemmings and Grizzy collide with Santa's sled, while fighting. The Lemmings find Santa's magic bag.

programme.title: E117 - Smells Like Trouble/Bad Teacher/Wannabe Hero/Mirror, Mirror, Who's The Strongest?/She
programme.desc: Trico loves his new deodorant. Wanda doesn’t have the heart to tell him that it smells really bad, and even convinces the flock to play along. She’s faced with a dilemma: how long can you keep up a lie to avoid hurting your friend’s feelings?

programme.title: E57 - $100/The Fair
programme.desc: The Baby Bears’ dreams come true when they find a 100-dollar bill. But when they can’t bear to spend it, they realise it’s difficult to let go.

programme.title: E134 - The List/The Deal/The Line/The Singing/The Puppets
programme.desc: When the kids find out that Mom's life hasn't panned out exactly as she'd hoped, they try to make her day a bit easier by taking on her chores. However, they accidentally grab her bucket list instead of her to-do list and end up attempting to tick off all of Nicole's life goals.

programme.title: E1 - Home Movie/Fish Sitting
programme.desc: Mr Bean makes his own horror movie and ropes in Mrs Wicket as the star!

programme.title: E21 - Trouble At Smelt Fishing/Lunch Time Is Quiet Time/Welcome To The Space/Deca Wants To
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected on fish scales by the lake. When Shiro arrives at the frozen lake, he drills a hole in it and competes with Deca at smelt-fishing.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Om Jai Jagdish
programme.desc: Three brothers, struggling with personal issues, must unite to save their ancestral home from auction. Their journey brings laughter, tears, and the rediscovery of family bonds. Release Year: 2002 Director: Anupam Kher

programme.title: Om Jai Jagdish
programme.desc: Three brothers, struggling with personal issues, must unite to save their ancestral home from auction. Their journey brings laughter, tears, and the rediscovery of family bonds. Release Year: 2002 Director: Anupam Kher

programme.desc: Three brothers, struggling with personal issues, must unite to save their ancestral home from auction. Their journey brings laughter, tears, and the rediscovery of family bonds. Release Year: 2002 Director: Anupam Kher

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E11 - 征服百米雪坡 詮釋熱血團魂
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 以美食為介質的全新文化訪談類節目，每集邀請文化名人、名廚大師、外籍帥哥、直播網紅和民間饕客一同做客飯局，在品嚐民間美味的同時，分享人生故事。

programme.title: E6 - 吳鎮宇罵哭徐夢潔
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。
